prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired video motion. Max 800 characters.
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Image file to use as the first frame. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP
image.title: Image

audio.description: Optional audio file to use as background music. Supported formats: WAV, MP3. Duration: 3-30s, max 15MB. Audio will be truncated if longer than video duration.
audio.title: Audio

resolution.description: Video resolution. Higher resolutions provide better quality but take longer to generate.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to describe content to avoid. Max 500 characters.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

enable_prompt_expansion.description: Whether to enable prompt rewriting using LLM for better results.
enable_prompt_expansion.title: Enable Prompt Expansion

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
seed.title: Seed
